final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style vertical cover image for a 素人 (everyday creator) media post featuring the 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 九宫格 (9-grid) layout arranged as a single vertical cover image, with central title text prominently placed
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 as the featured product, presented naturally as if held or used by an everyday person
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, lifestyle-oriented backdrop fitting 素人 creator content — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable, everyday atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful direction fitting 小红书 素人 content — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大疆Pocket4初体验" (central title, large, primary — cute and differentiated font style)
Constraints: must preserve 九宫格 grid structure visible within the single vertical cover; product 大疆 Pocket 4 must be clearly recognizable
Avoid:
